case_title: OLD REPUBLIC GENERAL INSURANCE CORPORATION VS. CHRISTOPHER KELLY ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-05-2016 CONTINUED TO JAN-04-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-14-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE JAN-04-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-06-2016 CONTINUED TO OCT-05-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

FEE PAID ON EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR EXTENSION OF TIME TO SERVE PLEADING AND ORDERS (TRANSACTION ID # 16167011) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLD REPUBLIC GENERAL INSURANCE CORPORATION

REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $323.75 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 60006614) AS TO DEFENDANT KELLY, CHRISTOPHER AN INDIVIDUAL
CERTIFY COPY OF JUDGMENT FACT RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT TO DMV FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLD REPUBLIC GENERAL INSURANCE CORPORATION

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 59436767), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLD REPUBLIC GENERAL INSURANCE CORPORATION SERVED JUL-21-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KELLY, CHRISTOPHER AN INDIVIDUAL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OLD REPUBLIC GENERAL INSURANCE CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KELLY, CHRISTOPHER AN INDIVIDUAL $5,863.30 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,863.30, SEE SCANNED DOC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 60006614) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-14-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
